name: 13-invalid-core-qualifier-key
description: Capability id `net:egress` has qualifier key `path` which is not in its allowed set. Per ADR-0005, net:egress accepts only host, port, scheme.
notes: Qualifier key validation is per-core-id closed. Extension-namespace qualifiers are freeform and would not trigger this rejection. This test ensures schema validators enforce the allowed-set table from ADR-0005, not just pass any keys through.
